title: Implement pure practice engine core and test infra
goal: Build a pure-function practice engine and Vitest test harness on top of the approved TASK-110 schema/type contract, without touching sim logic, practice UI, or runtime store wiring.
constraints: Keep practice and sim physically separated
No any, as any, ts-ignore, or ad-hoc eslint-disable
No React, Zustand, Supabase, or src/stores imports inside src/lib/practice/engine/*
No DB write in engine core
Do not create ingredient instances before a successful commit
Public engine APIs must not take nodeId parameters
Use practice_locations.id for all location parameters
Open-number and advance logic must be location-local, not global
No extra changes outside the approved write set
acceptance: package.json adds vitest and a test script, and package-lock.json is updated consistently
vitest.config.ts exists and runs tests in node environment
src/lib/practice/engine/* exports a pure engine core with no React/Zustand/Supabase/store imports
Engine runtime types are session-free and do not require DB row id/session_id fields
Ingredient instances are created only after successful placement commit
computeOpenNumber is location-local and respects both ingredient required-location and action location rules
tryPlaceIngredient, tryExecuteAction, tryPour, advanceLocation, and computeLegalActions are implemented and covered by tests
computeLegalActions exposes place/action/pour at player-action level without nodeId inputs
At least 5 engine test files exist and npm run test passes
npm run build and npx tsc --noEmit pass
No any usage, no sim/admin cross-import, and no extra changes relative to the session-start dirty snapshot
